lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: Please excuse me, I'm rather busy.

lines.text: I'd like a Wooden cupboard built.

lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: I'd like two Wooden shelves built.

lines.text: I'd like my hat stand fixed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I'm your contractor from Mahogany Homes, what did you want done?

lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: I'd like my sink fixed.

lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: I'd like two Mahogany tables built.

lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: I'd like a Mahogany cupboard built.

lines.speaker: Tau
lines.text: Thank you so much! Would you like a cup of tea before you go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd love a cuppa.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I better be off.
